title: Settings UI: show model capabilities, edit for third-party BYOK
prompt:
Surface the per-model capability metadata in Settings → Providers. Depends on the capability metadata layer task (per-model ModelCapability + wire contract in src/core/api-contract.ts).

For each provider/model:
- OFFICIAL providers: render the resolved capabilities READ-ONLY (context window, max output, vision, tool calling, reasoning effort, cost in/out, speed tier, cutoff).
- THIRD-PARTY BYOK (custom endpoint): make the capability fields EDITABLE so the user can declare what the SDK can't tell us; persist via the existing per-agent provider save path (saveAgentProvider / agent-provider-config.ts).

Follow the web-ui stack & styling rules in AGENTS.md (Tailwind v4, Radix, lucide, surface tokens, ui primitives in src/components/ui). Reuse the existing Settings → Providers add/edit dialog rather than building a parallel surface; gate the editable-vs-readonly behavior on whether the provider is third-party (generic custom endpoint) vs official, using the existing capability helpers.

Acceptance:
- Official provider shows capabilities, not editable.
- Third-party provider can edit & save capability fields; values round-trip and persist.
- Never sends/persists the raw API key as part of this (keep the masking work in task d7146 intact).
- web:typecheck + biome clean.
